events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: commercial construction, flashing & WRB integration, observed field condition: window pan flashing absent. Work rough-complete. References IRC R703 and mfr instructions. Window pan flashing is required for proper drainage and to prevent water intrusion. Absent pan flashing is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Water intrusion potential, but at rough-complete can be corrected before closeout. Risk high maybe medium? In building envelope, missing pan flashing is critical for water management. But since observed before closed out, risk maybe high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80. Value not asked 0. Confidence high 0.95. Event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Findings: window pan flashing missing at window openings. Actions: install approved pan flashing per manufacturer and code, integrate with WRB, inspect before closing. Rationale: IRC R703 and mfr instructions require flashing at window sills/pans to divert water out; absence creates water intrusion path. References: IRC R703, manufacturer instructions. Need ensure JSON valid.
